steps.title: Use the anonymity clue
steps.content: The No Name Series published novels anonymously and challenged readers to guess the authors' identities. The blank describes a publishing approach built around deliberate secrecy.

steps.title: Choose the secrecy word
steps.content: Choice A means introductory or preparatory. Choice C means clear and certain, the opposite of hidden authorship. Choice D means impossible to explain. The word for secret or concealed publishing matches the anonymous series. The answer is B.
